ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_name" TEXT /* Name of the game */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the game (e.g., action, adventure) */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the game */,
  "developer" TEXT /* Name of the game developer */,
  "game_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the game */,
  "game_version" TEXT /* Current version of the game */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the game was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the game was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episodes" (
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each episode */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the episode belongs to */,
  "episode_name" TEXT /* Name of the episode */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the episode */,
  "episode_order" INTEGER /* Order of the episode in the game */,
  "episode_status" TEXT /* Status of the episode (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the episode was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the episode was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episodes_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each level */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode the level belongs to */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the level */,
  "level_order" INTEGER /* Order of the level in the episode */,
  "level_status" TEXT /* Status of the level (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the level was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the level was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_levels_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who achieved the score */,
  "level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the level the score belongs to */,
  "score" REAL /* Score achieved by the player */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time when the score was achieved */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views for the score */,
  "score_status" TEXT /* Status of the score (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the score was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the score was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("level_id") REFERENCES levels ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the player (hashed for security) */,
  "player_status" TEXT /* Status of the player (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ranks" (
  "rank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rank */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who achieved the rank */,
  "level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the level the rank belongs to */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Rank achieved by the player (e.g., 1st, 2nd, 3rd) */,
  "rank_date" TEXT /* Date when the rank was achieved */,
  "rank_status" TEXT /* Status of the rank (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rank was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rank was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rank_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ranks_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ranks_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("level_id") REFERENCES levels ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaderboards" (
  "leaderboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leaderboard */,
  "level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the level the leaderboard belongs to */,
  "leaderboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the leaderboard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the leaderboard */,
  "leaderboard_type" TEXT /* Type of the leaderboard (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the leaderboard was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the leaderboard was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leaderboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboards_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("level_id") REFERENCES levels ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_modes" (
  "game_mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game mode */,
  "game_mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the game mode */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the game mode */,
  "game_mode_status" TEXT /* Status of the game mode (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the game mode was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the game mode was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_mode_levels" (
  "game_mode_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game mode level */,
  "game_mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game mode the level belongs to */,
  "level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the level */,
  "game_mode_level_status" TEXT /* Status of the game mode level (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the game mode level was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the game mode level was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_mode_level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_mode_levels_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("level_id") REFERENCES levels ("level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_mode_levels_game_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_mode_id") REFERENCES game_modes ("game_mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_game_modes" (
  "player_game_mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player game mode */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game mode */,
  "player_game_mode_status" TEXT /* Status of the player game mode (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player game mode was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player game mode was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_game_mode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_modes_game_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_mode_id") REFERENCES game_modes ("game_mode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_modes_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaderboard_scores" (
  "leaderboard_score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leaderboard score */,
  "leaderboard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the leaderboard */,
  "score_id" INTEGER /* ID of the score */,
  "leaderboard_score_status" TEXT /* Status of the leaderboard score (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the leaderboard score was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the leaderboard score was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leaderboard_score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboard_scores_score_id FOREIGN KEY ("score_id") REFERENCES scores ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboard_scores_leaderboard_id FOREIGN KEY ("leaderboard_id") REFERENCES leaderboards ("leaderboard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_leaderboards" (
  "player_leaderboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player leaderboard */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "leaderboard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the leaderboard */,
  "player_leaderboard_status" TEXT /* Status of the player leaderboard (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player leaderboard was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player leaderboard was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_leaderboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_leaderboards_leaderboard_id FOREIGN KEY ("leaderboard_id") REFERENCES leaderboards ("leaderboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_leaderboards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
